tiny.en.label: Tiny (English) — fastest, lowest accuracy (~0.075 GB)
tiny.en.name: faster-whisper-tiny.en
tiny.en.info: ~75 MB, English-only. The fastest and least accurate model — useful for quick drafts or very low-power hardware.

tiny.label: Tiny — fastest, lowest accuracy, multilingual (~0.075 GB)
tiny.name: faster-whisper-tiny
tiny.info: ~75 MB, multilingual. The fastest and least accurate model — useful for quick drafts or very low-power hardware.

base.en.label: Base (English) — very fast, low accuracy (~0.145 GB)
base.en.name: faster-whisper-base.en
base.en.info: ~145 MB, English-only. Very fast with modest accuracy — a step up from Tiny for short, low-stakes clips.

base.label: Base — very fast, low accuracy, multilingual (~0.145 GB)
base.name: faster-whisper-base
base.info: ~145 MB, multilingual. Very fast with modest accuracy — a step up from Tiny for short, low-stakes clips.

small.en.label: Small (English) — fast, moderate accuracy (~0.5 GB)
small.en.name: faster-whisper-small.en
small.en.info: ~500 MB, English-only. Good speed/accuracy balance for everyday English transcripts on modest hardware.

small.label: Small — fast, moderate accuracy, multilingual (~0.5 GB)
small.name: faster-whisper-small
small.info: ~500 MB, multilingual. Good speed/accuracy balance for everyday transcripts on modest hardware.

medium.en.label: Medium (English) — slower, good accuracy (~1.5 GB)
medium.en.name: faster-whisper-medium.en
medium.en.info: ~1.5 GB, English-only. Noticeably more accurate than Small at roughly half the speed.

medium.label: Medium — slower, good accuracy, multilingual (~1.5 GB)
medium.name: faster-whisper-medium
medium.info: ~1.5 GB, multilingual. Noticeably more accurate than Small at roughly half the speed.

large-v1.label: Large v1 — older large model, multilingual (~3 GB)
large-v1.name: faster-whisper-large-v1
large-v1.info: ~3 GB, multilingual. The original large model — kept for compatibility; Large v2/v3 are generally more accurate.

large-v2.label: Large v2 — high accuracy, multilingual (~3 GB)
large-v2.name: faster-whisper-large-v2
large-v2.info: ~3 GB, multilingual. High accuracy, slower than the Turbo models — superseded by Large v3 for most languages.

large-v3.label: Large v3 — best accuracy (default, ~3 GB)
large-v3.name: faster-whisper-large-v3
large-v3.info: ~3 GB, multilingual. The most accurate general-purpose model — slowest of the large models. Default choice.

distil-small.en.label: Distil Small (English) — fast, English-only (~0.4 GB)
distil-small.en.name: faster-distil-whisper-small.en
distil-small.en.info: ~400 MB, English-only. Distilled for speed — faster than Small with similar English accuracy.

distil-medium.en.label: Distil Medium (English) — fast, English-only (~0.8 GB)
distil-medium.en.name: faster-distil-whisper-medium.en
distil-medium.en.info: ~800 MB, English-only. Distilled for speed — faster than Medium with similar English accuracy.

distil-large-v2.label: Distil Large v2 — fast, English-only (~1.5 GB)
distil-large-v2.name: faster-distil-whisper-large-v2
distil-large-v2.info: ~1.5 GB, English-only. Distilled from Large v2 for ~5x speed with close to its English accuracy.

distil-large-v3.label: Distil Large v3 — fast, English-only (~1.5 GB)
distil-large-v3.name: faster-distil-whisper-large-v3
distil-large-v3.info: ~1.5 GB, English-only. Distilled from Large v3 for ~5x speed with close to its English accuracy.

distil-large-v3.5.label: Distil Large v3.5 — fastest English-only (~1.5 GB)
distil-large-v3.5.name: faster-distil-whisper-large-v3.5
distil-large-v3.5.info: ~1.5 GB, English-only. The newest distilled large model — fastest English-only option with accuracy close to Large v3.

large-v3-turbo.label: Large v3 Turbo — ~5x faster, similar accuracy (~1.6 GB)
large-v3-turbo.name: faster-whisper-large-v3-turbo
large-v3-turbo.info: ~1.6 GB, multilingual. ~5x faster than Large v3 with similar accuracy — a strong general-purpose default.

deepdml-large-v3-turbo.label: Large v3 Turbo (deepdml) — ~5x faster, multilingual (~1.6 GB)
deepdml-large-v3-turbo.name: faster-whisper-large-v3-turbo-deepdml
deepdml-large-v3-turbo.info: ~1.6 GB, multilingual. Community CT2 conversion of the Large v3 Turbo weights — ~5x faster than Large v3 with similar accuracy.
